relationships.description: Sorghums can be improved through the lead NARS approach
Visual hardness score was measured for sorghum landraces
Kernel weight was measured for sorghum landraces
Floaters were measured for sorghum landraces
Size fractions were measured for sorghum landraces
Dehulling loss was measured for sorghum landraces
Milling yield was measured for sorghum landraces
Water absorption was measured for sorghum landraces
Agtron readings were measured for sorghum landraces
Tannin contents were measured for sorghum landraces
Landraces were compared with released short-season sorghums
